title: This overlooked index is a better investment than the S&P 500
summary: Analysis over a 30-year period shows a lesser-known stock index outperformed the S&P 500 significantly. The finding suggests investors may be overlooking alternative indices with superior long-term returns.
content: We did the math over a 30-year period, and it’s not even close.

zh.title: 这个被忽视的指数比标普500更好的投资
zh.summary: 对30年期间的分析显示，一个鲜为人知的股票指数大幅跑赢标普500。这项发现表明投资者可能忽视了具有卓越长期回报的替代指数。

title: Midnight social media curfew proposed for older UK teens
summary: The UK is proposing a midnight curfew on social media access for older teens, though teens can opt out of the restrictions. Critics argue the measures are insufficient and piecemeal in addressing broader social media concerns for young people.
content: Teens will be able to opt out of the restrictions - campaigners have criticised them as being piecemeal.

zh.title: 英国针对年长青少年提议午夜社交媒体宵禁
zh.summary: 英国正提议对年长青少年的社交媒体访问实施午夜宵禁，尽管青少年可以选择退出这些限制。批评者辩称这些措施不足以解决年轻人更广泛的社交媒体问题。

title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Stock markets closed higher Tuesday as easing inflation data encouraged investors to hope the Federal Reserve may pause rate hikes. The softer inflation reading provides market support ahead of the next trading session.
content: Stocks closed higher on Tuesday, helped by signs of easing inflation, which boosted investor hopes that the Federal Reserve can hold off on rate hikes for the moment.

zh.title: 周三的大股票新闻：下一交易时段可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 由于通胀数据缓解促使投资者希望美联储可能暂停加息，股市周二收高。较温和的通胀读数为下一交易时段的市场提供支撑。

title: I changed jobs 10 times in 10 years to get the career I wanted
summary: A trending workplace practice called lily-padding sees young professionals change jobs frequently to advance their careers faster. The strategy reflects shifting attitudes toward job loyalty and career progression in today's labor market.
content: The lily-padding trend sees young people repeatedly move jobs to try to advance in the workplace.

zh.title: 我在十年内换了十次工作来获得理想的职业
zh.summary: 一种称为"跳槽"的职场趋势现象使年轻专业人士通过频繁换工作来更快地推进职业发展。这一策略反映了当今劳动力市场中人们对工作忠诚度和职业发展的态度转变。

title: Buy Now Pay Later rules to bring refunds and rejections
summary: New regulations require Buy Now Pay Later lenders to obtain authorization to operate, providing consumers with better protections including refunds and ability to reject transactions. The rules aim to strengthen consumer safeguards in the rapidly growing BNPL sector.
content: Consumers should be better protected as Buy Now Pay Later lenders now require authorisation to operate.

zh.title: 先买后付规则将引入退款和交易拒绝
zh.summary: 新规定要求先买后付贷方获得经营授权，为消费者提供包括退款和拒绝交易能力在内的更好保护。这些规则旨在加强快速增长的先买后付行业中的消费者保障。

title: Heating oil customers to get compensation after price hikes
summary: Heating oil customers will receive compensation for price spikes caused by the U.S.-Israel war with Iran that drove up crude oil costs. The compensation addresses consumer hardship from geopolitical events that increased energy prices.
content: The cost of hearing oil spike following the US-Israel war with Iran which forced up crude prices.

zh.title: 取暖油消费者将因价格上涨获得补偿
zh.summary: 取暖油消费者将因美国-以色列与伊朗战争导致的价格飙升而获得补偿，该战争推高了原油成本。补偿旨在解决地缘政治事件导致能源价格上升对消费者造成的困难。

title: Yum's Taco Bell removes select items, says no confirmed link to U.S. cyclosporiasis outbreak
summary: Taco Bell has removed select menu items as a precautionary measure during a cyclosporiasis outbreak, though U.S. health officials have not yet linked the illness to the chain or any specific product. The move balances consumer caution with the lack of confirmed connection.
content: Yum Brands' Taco Bell said on Tuesday it had removed limited items from some restaurants as a precaution but said U.S. health officials have not linked the widening outbreak of cyclosporiasis to the chain or any specific food product.

zh.title: 塔可钟声移除精选项目，否认与美国隐孢子虫病爆发有关
zh.summary: 塔可钟声作为预防措施移除了精选菜单项目以应对隐孢子虫病爆发，但美国卫生官员尚未将该疾病与该连锁店或任何特定产品联系起来。此举在消费者谨慎态度与缺乏确认联系之间取得平衡。

title: Jim Cramer says concerns about AI market froth are overblown. Here's why
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer argues that current AI-related market concerns are exaggerated, comparing today's market favorably to the dot-com bubble era. He contends the current investment environment is less risky despite elevated AI valuations.
content: CNBC's Jim Cramer said today's stock market is far less concerning than it was during the dot-com bubble.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默称对人工智能市场泡沫的担忧被过度夸大
zh.summary: CNBC的吉姆·克莱默辩称当前与人工智能相关的市场担忧被夸大了，将今天的市场与互联网泡沫时代进行了有利的比较。他主张尽管人工智能估值较高，但当前投资环境风险较小。

title: From Wimbledon towels to Scotch: What India-UK trade deal could mean for shoppers
summary: A new free trade agreement between India and the UK has taken effect, promising changes to consumer goods from Wimbledon towels to Scotch whisky. The deal between the world's fifth and sixth largest economies aims to boost trade and consumer choice.
content: The free trade agreement between the world's fifth and sixth largest economies has come into effect - can it deliver?

zh.title: 从温布尔登毛巾到苏格兰威士忌：印度-英国贸易协议对购物者意味着什么
zh.summary: 印度与英国之间新的自由贸易协议已生效，承诺改变消费品，从温布尔登毛巾到苏格兰威士忌。这项协议涉及世界第五和第六大经济体，旨在促进贸易和消费者选择。

title: Global oil prices notch back-to-back rise, remain ‘tethered to the Hormuz narrative’
summary: Global oil prices surged to their largest two-day gain since mid-March, driven by escalating U.S.-Iran tensions around the Strait of Hormuz. The geopolitical conflict continues to push crude higher as markets remain sensitive to Middle East disruption risks.
content: Global oil prices on Tuesday notched their largest two-day rise since mid-March, buoyed by further escalation in the U.S.-Iran conflict.

zh.title: 全球油价连续上升，仍受"霍尔木兹事件"牵制
zh.summary: 全球油价在3月中旬以来最大的两天涨幅中飙升，由美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡周围的紧张局势升级驱动。地缘政治冲突继续推高原油价格，因为市场对中东中断风险仍然敏感。

title: Brace for $4 gas again: How U.S.-Iran tensions are threatening to end the price break at the pump
summary: Recent declines in gas prices helped cool inflation, but U.S.-Iran tensions threaten to reverse gains at the pump. If the conflict intensifies, Americans could face $4 gas again as the two nations compete for control of crucial shipping routes.
content: Americans got some relief at the gas pump in recent weeks, enough to slow down inflation. That might not last long as the U.S. and Iran continue to vie for control of the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 准备再次面对4美元油价：美伊紧张关系如何威胁汽油价格下降
zh.summary: 最近汽油价格下跌有助于冷却通胀，但美伊紧张关系威胁反转加油站的收益。如果冲突加剧，美国人可能再次面临4美元油价，因为两个国家竞争控制关键运输路线。

title: Caution warranted on this red hot AI cloud data stock that's now 'priced for perfection,' says Todd Gordon
summary: Datadog, a cloud monitoring platform stock, has surged higher but analysts now caution it may be overvalued at current levels. The stock appears priced for perfection with limited room for disappointment.
content: Datadog runs the control room for modern software: it pulls data from a company's servers, apps and cloud services into one place.

zh.title: 托德·戈登称这只火热的AI云数据股票现在"定价完美"需谨慎
zh.summary: 云监控平台Datadog股票已经大幅上升，但分析师现在警告其可能在当前水平被高估。该股票似乎已为完美定价，失望的空间有限。

title: Lucid dismisses report that it is weighing filing for bankruptcy or going private after shares plunge
summary: Lucid rejected reports that it is exploring bankruptcy filing or going private following a sharp stock decline. The electric vehicle maker denied the claims as shares face pressure from broader industry challenges.
content: The report said Lucid was considering options that could include going private or filing for bankruptcy protection.

zh.title: 路西德否认考虑破产或私有化的报告
zh.summary: 路西德驳斥了关于其探索破产申请或私有化的报告。这家电动汽车制造商否认了这些说法，其股价面临来自更广泛行业挑战的压力。

title: We're raising our price target on Goldman Sachs after a blowout quarter, upbeat outlook
summary: Goldman Sachs stock surged to record highs after delivering an earnings beat, prompting analysts to raise their price targets. The investment bank's strong quarter and positive outlook drove investor enthusiasm.
content: Shares of Goldman are surging to record highs thanks to a massive earnings beat.

zh.title: 高盛财报亮眼前景乐观，我们上调目标股价
zh.summary: 高盛股价在超预期业绩和积极前景后创下历史新高，促使分析师上调其目标股价。这家投资银行强劲的季度业绩和积极前景推动了投资者热情。

title: New York becomes first U.S. state to impose AI data center ban
summary: New York became the first U.S. state to ban construction of hyperscale AI data centers, imposing a one-year moratorium. Governor Kathy Hochul signed the executive order citing energy and infrastructure concerns.
content: New York became the first state to ban construction of 'hyperscale' AI data centers, for one year, after Gov. Kathy Hochul signed an executive order Tuesday.

zh.title: 纽约成为美国首个实施人工智能数据中心禁令的州
zh.summary: 纽约成为美国首个禁止超大规模人工智能数据中心建设的州，实施为期一年的暂停令。州长凯西·霍楚尔签署了行政令，理由是能源和基础设施方面的考虑。

title: Cybersecurity stocks surge thanks to IBM, and Nvidia climbs on more good China news
summary: Cybersecurity stocks gained ground alongside Nvidia as tech sector momentum strengthened on positive China-related developments. The rally reflects renewed investor confidence in semiconductor and security-related equities.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: 网络安全股票飙升，英伟达因中国利好消息上涨
zh.summary: 网络安全股票随着英伟达一起上升，科技部门在中国相关积极发展的推动下势头增强。此次上涨反映了投资者对半导体和安全相关股票的重新信心。

title: Social Security cost-of-living adjustment estimate for 2027 falls as inflation cools
summary: Social Security's projected cost-of-living adjustment for 2027 is now estimated between 3.7% and 3.8%, down from earlier forecasts. The decline reflects easing inflation but still impacts retirement planning for millions.
content: New estimates show Social Security's annual cost-of-living adjustment for 2027 may be between 3.7% and 3.8%. Here's what to know.

zh.title: 随着通胀降温，2027年社会保障生活成本调整估计下降
zh.summary: 社会保障对2027年的生活成本调整预计现在估计在3.7%至3.8%之间，低于早期预测。下降反映了通胀缓解，但仍将影响数百万人的退休规划。

title: Supreme Court Justice Barrett says the threat level against judges 'is really high'
summary: Supreme Court justices Amy Coney Barrett and Elena Kagan testified that threats against judges remain at elevated levels. The court is requesting increased security funding as part of its annual budget submission.
content: Supreme Court Justices Amy Coney Barrett and Elena Kagan are testifying about the high court's budget request, which includes higher spending for security.

zh.title: 最高法院法官巴雷特表示对法官的威胁水平"非常高"
zh.summary: 最高法院法官艾米·科尼·巴雷特和埃琳娜·卡根作证说，对法官的威胁仍然处于高水平。法院要求增加安全资金以作为其年度预算提交的一部分。

title: Cybersecurity stocks rally on AI spending change comments from IBM's Krishna
summary: IBM CEO Arvind Krishna indicated major customers are pausing AI spending decisions as businesses reassess their technology investments. The shift in spending behavior is affecting cybersecurity and cloud infrastructure stocks.
content: IBM CEO Arvind Krishna told CNBC's Sara Eisen that some major deals were put on hold toward the end of the quarter as businesses rethink spending.

zh.title: 网络安全股因IBM首席执行官评论AI支出变化而走高
zh.summary: IBM首席执行官阿尔文·克里希那表示，主要客户正在暂停AI支出决策，因为企业重新评估其技术投资。这种支出行为的转变正在影响网络安全和云基础设施股票。

title: IBM’s stock is having its worst day ever after the surprise release of an earnings miss
summary: IBM stock plummeted to its worst day ever following an unexpected earnings miss with profit and revenue falling well short of expectations. The disappointing results triggered a sharp selloff in the technology giant's shares.
content: IBM’s stock plunges after a preliminary release of profit and revenue that were well below expectations.

zh.title: IBM股票因意外盈利预警创下有史以来最差的一天
zh.summary: IBM股票在意外盈利预警后跌至历史最低，利润和收入远低于预期。令人失望的财报结果引发了这家科技巨头股价的急剧下跌。

title: Warren Buffett is accelerating his charitable donations with aim to give away Berkshire wealth by 2034
summary: Warren Buffett is accelerating his charitable donations, giving $6 billion to family foundations with a goal to distribute his Berkshire Hathaway wealth by 2034. The billionaire is stepping up the pace of his philanthropic commitments.
content: Warren Buffett is speeding up the pace of his annual donations of Berkshire Hathaway shares to four family foundations, giving them a total of almost $6 billion now.

zh.title: 沃伦·巴菲特加快慈善捐赠，目标在2034年完成伯克希尔财富分配
zh.summary: 沃伦·巴菲特加快慈善捐赠步伐，向家族基金会捐赠60亿美元，目标在2034年前完成伯克希尔·哈撒韦财富的分配。这位亿万富翁正在加快其慈善承诺的步伐。

title: Homes are getting more affordable. So how come you still can’t afford to buy one?
summary: While home price appreciation has slowed, homeownership remains unaffordable for many Americans as prices stay elevated while incomes have not caught up. The affordability crisis persists despite moderating rate of price increases.
content: Home prices exploded over the past five years. They’re now going up more slowly, but incomes have still not kept up.

zh.title: 房屋变得更便宜了。那你为什么仍然买不起呢？
zh.summary: 虽然房价升值速度放缓，但美国许多人的房屋所有权仍然负担不起，因为房价仍然居高不下，而收入却没有跟上。尽管房价上升速度趋缓，但可负担性危机仍在持续。

title: Apple in talks with startup that shrinks AI models to run on an iPhone
summary: Apple is in talks with startup PrismML to bring compressed AI models to iPhones, potentially enabling on-device AI capabilities. The technology can reduce model memory requirements by up to 15 times, advancing Apple's artificial intelligence strategy.
content: PrismML says its compressed version of Alibaba’s Qwen model uses up to 15 times less memory, potentially advancing Apple’s AI push.

zh.title: 苹果与初创公司谈判将AI模型压缩到iPhone上运行
zh.summary: 苹果与初创公司PrismML正在谈判，将压缩的AI模型带到iPhone上，可能实现设备上的AI功能。该技术可以将模型内存要求减少高达15倍，推进苹果的人工智能战略。

title: Zipline adds ex-Tesla, Uber, Waymo execs to make drone delivery mainstream across U.S.
summary: Drone delivery company Zipline hired executives from Tesla, Uber, and Waymo to accelerate expansion of its U.S. operations. The additions signal aggressive scaling plans to make drone delivery a mainstream service across the country.
content: Zipline is growing its drone delivery business in the U.S., and has hired former Tesla, Uber Eats and Waymo executives to help it scale up in new markets.

zh.title: Zipline聘请特斯拉、优步、Waymo前高管，使无人机送货成为美国主流
zh.summary: 无人机配送公司Zipline从特斯拉、优步和Waymo聘请了高管，以加速其美国运营的扩展。这些任命表明了激进的扩展计划，使无人机送货成为全国范围内的主流服务。

title: Bank earnings live updates: Jamie Dimon says AI has helped JPMorgan cut up to 40% of jobs in certain roles
summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon reported that artificial intelligence has enabled the bank to reduce headcount by up to 40% in specific roles, highlighting automation's impact on employment. The disclosure came during strong earnings results alongside robust trading revenue from major banks.
content: The five banks releasing earnings Tuesday morning have reported strong revenue from equities trading.

zh.title: 银行财报直播更新：杰米·迪蒙称AI帮助摩根大通削减了某些岗位40%的员工
zh.summary: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·迪蒙报告称，人工智能使该银行能够在特定岗位上将人员编制削减高达40%，突显自动化对就业的影响。这一披露是在银行发布强劲财报结果和交易收入的同时做出的。

title: IBM stock craters 23% after issuing second-quarter earnings warning
summary: IBM's stock plummeted 23% following a second-quarter earnings warning, as the CEO attributed weakness to clients reducing software and infrastructure spending in favor of hardware purchases. The shift signals changing enterprise technology investment priorities.
content: CEO blamed the shortfall on weakness in the software and infrastructure business because clients shifted money toward hardware purchases.

zh.title: IBM股票在发出第二季度财报预警后暴跌23%
zh.summary: 在发出第二季度财报预警后，IBM股票暴跌23%，首席执行官将疲弱表现归咎于客户减少软件和基础设施支出，转向硬件购买。这一转变表明企业技术投资优先级在发生变化。

title: Sen. Tim Scott wants to hear from Warsh on data centers and artificial intelligence
summary: Senator Tim Scott is scheduled to host Kevin Warsh for testimony before the Senate Banking Committee on Wednesday, marking Warsh's first congressional appearance as Federal Reserve chairman. The hearing will examine data centers and artificial intelligence.
content: Sen. Tim Scott, R-S.C., will host Kevin Warsh before the Senate Banking Committee on Wednesday for his first time testifying as Fed chairman.

zh.title: 蒂姆·斯科特参议员希望听取沃什关于数据中心和人工智能的意见
zh.summary: 蒂姆·斯科特参议员定于周三在参议院银行委员会前举办凯文·沃什的证词听证会，这是沃什作为美联储主席的首次国会出庭。听证会将审查数据中心和人工智能问题。

title: Jamie Dimon says ‘booming’ markets and a ‘fine’ consumer fueled JPMorgan’s blowout profits
summary: JPMorgan significantly exceeded second-quarter earnings expectations, with CEO Jamie Dimon attributing strong results to booming financial markets and resilient consumer spending. The performance underscores the bank's profitability amid favorable economic conditions.
content: JPMorgan blew past earnings expectations for the second quarter, as CEO Jamie Dimon said markets are booming.

zh.title: 杰米·戴蒙表示"火爆"的市场和"稳健"的消费者推动了摩根大通的利润飙升
zh.summary: 摩根大通第二季度业绩大幅超越预期，首席执行官杰米·戴蒙将强劲表现归功于蓬勃发展的金融市场和韧性强的消费支出。这一表现彰显了该银行在有利经济条件下的盈利能力。

title: Inflation had its biggest monthly decline in six years. What Wall Street is saying now
summary: June's inflation report showed the largest monthly decline in six years, delivering positive surprises to Wall Street analysts. The data suggests meaningful relief from persistent inflation pressures that have plagued the economy.
content: June's inflation report was not what many on the Street expected, in a good way.

zh.title: 通胀创六年来最大月度跌幅。华尔街现在怎么看
zh.summary: 6月份通胀报告显示了六年来最大的月度下降，给华尔街分析师带来了积极惊喜。这些数据表明经济获得了有意义的缓解，摆脱了长期困扰经济的通胀压力。

title: My insurance company said my roof lost a few tiles. Loss adjusters found $10,000 in storm damage. How could this happen?
summary: An insurance policyholder discovered a significant gap between the insurance company's initial roof damage assessment and an independent adjuster's finding of $10,000 in additional storm damage. The discrepancy highlights potential disparities in initial insurance evaluations.
content: “My house shook violently from the wind.”

zh.title: 保险公司说我的屋顶只损失了几块瓦片。理赔人员发现了10,000美元的风灾损失。这怎么可能？
zh.summary: 一位保险投保人发现保险公司初步的屋顶损坏评估与独立理赔人员发现的10,000美元追加风灾损失之间存在巨大差异。这种差异突显了初步保险评估中可能存在的不一致之处。

title: Consumer prices rose 3.5% annually in June, less than expected as energy prices eased
summary: June's Consumer Price Index rose 3.5% annually, falling short of the anticipated 3.8% increase as lower energy prices provided relief. The softer-than-expected reading offers some optimism in the ongoing battle against price pressures.
content: The consumer price index in June was expected to increase 3.8% from a year ago.

zh.title: 六月消费者价格同比上升3.5%，低于预期，因能源价格缓解
zh.summary: 六月消费者价格指数同比上升3.5%，低于预期的3.8%增幅，因能源价格下降提供缓解。这个低于预期的数据为持续应对物价压力提供了一些乐观迹象。

title: Your stock portfolio is tied to the Japanese yen — and a looming intervention is flashing a major warning sign
summary: The Japanese yen's relationship to U.S. stock portfolios presents portfolio risks, with expectations of currency intervention creating warning signals for investors. The article examines how yen movements can influence broader market dynamics.
content: What the link between the yen and U.S. stocks means for your portfolio.

zh.title: 你的股票投资组合与日元挂钩——迫近的干预措施闪现重大警告信号
zh.summary: 日元与美国股票投资组合的关系带来投资组合风险，对货币干预的预期为投资者创造警告信号。该文章探讨了日元波动如何影响更广泛的市场动态。

title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Tuesday
summary: With weaker-than-expected inflation data and bank earnings season beginning, Jim Cramer highlights ten key stock market developments to monitor as S&P 500 futures gain ground. The focus covers major economic data and earnings catalysts driving market movement.
content: S&P 500 futures are up after June inflation data came in weaker than expected and earnings season kicked off with the banks.

zh.title: 吉姆·克雷默关于周二股市需要关注的十大要点
zh.summary: 在通胀数据弱于预期和银行财报季开始之际，吉姆·克雷默强调了需要监控的十项关键股市动态，因标普500期货上涨。重点包括驱动市场变动的主要经济数据和财报催化剂。

title: World Cup's biggest spenders show up late as semifinals drive host city travel boom
summary: Travel demand to U.S. cities hosting World Cup events is surging as the tournament enters the semifinal stage, with major-spending nations arriving late for the playoffs. The phenomenon is generating significant economic activity and visitor spending.
content: World Cup travel demand to U.S. host cities is spiking as the tournament reaches the semifinal stage.

zh.title: 世界杯半决赛引发主办城市旅游热潮，最大消费国迟到参赛
zh.summary: 随着世界杯进入半决赛阶段，美国世界杯主办城市的旅游需求激增，大消费国家为季后赛迟到而来。这一现象正在产生显著的经济活动和游客消费。

title: US inflation rate eases to 3.5% as gasoline prices fall
summary: The U.S. inflation rate declined to 3.5% in June as gasoline prices fell, providing relief from elevated price levels. However, renewed Middle East conflict poses risks to future inflation through potential energy price impacts.
content: While the US inflation rate fell in June, concerns remain over price rises increasing again due to the renewed conflict in the Middle East.

zh.title: 汽油价格下跌，美国6月通胀率缓解至3.5%
zh.summary: 由于汽油价格下跌，美国6月通货膨胀率下降至3.5%，缓解了价格高企的压力。然而，中东冲突重燃对未来通胀构成风险，可能通过能源价格产生影响。

title: United Airlines' new upsell: Keeping other travelers out of the middle seat
summary: United Airlines is introducing a premium option allowing customers to pay additional fees to keep middle seats empty on its Airbus A321XLR aircraft. The service represents the airline's latest monetization strategy for passenger comfort preferences.
content: United Airlines will allow customers to pay more to keep the middle seat open on its Airbus A321XLRs

zh.title: 联合航空新推销策略：付费保持中间座位空座
zh.summary: 联合航空推出一项高级选项，允许乘客支付额外费用在其空客A321XLR飞机上保持中间座位空座。该服务代表航空公司为乘客舒适度偏好的最新商业化策略。

title: ‘They are relentless’: A scammer is trying to change the email on my empty Robinhood account. What do they have to gain?
summary: A Robinhood user reports ongoing scammer attempts to change the email on an unused account, raising questions about potential motivations for targeting dormant accounts. The incident highlights persistent credential attack threats even for inactive accounts.
content: “I’ve just been ignoring their attempts.”

zh.title: "他们锲而不舍"：诈骗分子试图更改我空置Robinhood账户的邮箱。他们能得到什么好处？
zh.summary: 一名Robinhood用户报告诈骗分子不断尝试更改其未使用账户的邮箱，引发了关于为何针对休眠账户的疑问。该事件突显了即使对于非活跃账户也存在持久的凭据攻击威胁。

title: Consumer prices fall for first time since early days of COVID pandemic, but war against high inflation isn’t won
summary: Consumer prices declined for the first time since the early pandemic period, driven primarily by falling gasoline prices during a recent Iran cease-fire, though renewed conflict threatens future gains. The decline marks progress but not victory in combating inflation.
content: Plunge in gas prices during recent Iran cease-fire brought some relief. Renewed conflict poses fresh threat.

zh.title: 消费者物价自新冠疫情初期以来首次下跌，但对抗高通胀的战争尚未结束
zh.summary: 消费者物价自疫情初期以来首次下跌，主要由于最近伊朗停火期间汽油价格下跌，但冲突再起将威胁这一进展。此下跌表明在抗击通胀方面取得了进步，但胜负未定。

title: SpaceX alumni building remote-controlled construction equipment land $115 million fund round
summary: TerraFirma, a construction equipment company founded by SpaceX veterans, announced a $115 million funding round to support hiring, factory expansion, and mission control development. The investment signals growing interest in autonomous construction technology.
content: TerraFirma on Tuesday said it raised $115 to support new hires and the building of a new factory and mission control center.

zh.title: SpaceX校友创办的遥控建筑设备公司获得1.15亿美元融资
zh.summary: 由SpaceX校友创办的建筑设备公司TerraFirma宣布完成1.15亿美元融资轮，用于支持招聘、工厂扩张和任务控制开发。这项投资表明市场对自主建筑技术的兴趣日益增长。

title: China exports in June rise at fastest pace since 2021 as AI boom, tariff rush lift trade
summary: China's exports surged at the fastest pace since 2021 in June, with U.S.-bound shipments jumping 14% while imports grew 26%, driven by AI demand and companies rushing ahead of potential tariffs.
content: China's exports to the U.S. jumped around 14% last month while imports grew 26%, according to CNBC calculation of the official data.

zh.title: 中国6月出口创2021年来最快增速，AI热潮和关税潮推动贸易增长
zh.summary: 中国6月出口创2021年以来最快增速，美国方向出口激增14%，进口增长26%，受人工智能需求和企业抢在潜在关税前出货的推动。

title: Taiwan's second-largest chipmaker starts mass production in Singapore; Citi sees improving outlook
summary: Taiwan's UMC, the second-largest chipmaker, has begun mass production of silicon photonics wafers at its Singapore facility, with analyst firm Citi forecasting an improving market outlook.
content: Taiwan’s UMC has kicked off mass production of silicon photonics wafers at its Singapore facility amid positive Citi forecast.

zh.title: 台湾第二大芯片制造商在新加坡启动大规模生产；花旗看好市场前景
zh.summary: 台湾第二大芯片制造商联电已在其新加坡工厂开始硅光子晶圆的量产，分析公司花旗预测市场前景有所改善。

title: Pop-up free school uniform and prom dress stall
summary: A community pop-up initiative offers free school uniforms and prom dresses through donation and swap exchanges, helping families access essential clothing.
content: People are being encouraged to donate, swap or take items they need for free.

zh.title: 免费校服和舞会礼服流动摊位
zh.summary: 社区快闪活动通过捐赠和物品交换提供免费校服和舞会礼服，帮助家庭获得必需的衣物。

title: Parent cooking classes 'built my confidence'
summary: A new parent cooking program teaches healthy, convenient recipes to build parents' confidence in meal preparation for their families.
content: New cooking scheme aims to help parents learn healthy recipes which are convenient to make.

zh.title: 家长烹饪课程"增强了我的信心"
zh.summary: 一个新的家长烹饪项目教授健康、便捷的食谱，以增强家长在为家人准备饭菜时的信心。

title: Call for right to grow food on unused public land
summary: Advocates are calling for the right to use unused public land for community gardens and allotments, a practice some London councils already support.
content: Some London council already allow unused land to be turned into gardens, allotments and flowerbeds.

zh.title: 呼吁在闲置公共土地上种植食物的权利
zh.summary: 倡导者呼吁有权在闲置的公共土地上建立社区花园和小菜地，这一做法已得到一些伦敦议会的支持。

title: How US commerce secretary's Epstein links were uncovered by British whistleblower
summary: A British whistleblower discovered connections between U.S. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick and Epstein files that were publicly released, raising questions about his background.
content: Simon Andriesz made the discovery about Howard Lutnick in publicly released Epstein files.

zh.title: 英国举报人如何曝光美国商务部长与爱泼斯坦的关联
zh.summary: 一名英国举报人发现了美国商务部长霍华德·卢特尼克与公开发布的爱泼斯坦文件之间的联系，这引发了对他背景的质疑。

title: 'Nobody underwrote for that': Private credit faces a key test as higher rates squeeze borrowers
summary: The private credit market faces mounting pressure from elevated interest rates, which are squeezing already-stressed borrowers and challenging the viability of some deals.
content: Private credit is facing a new pressure point from elevated rates, which could hit under-pressure borrowers.

zh.title: "没人给这个承保"：高利率挤压借款人之际，私募信贷面临关键考验
zh.summary: 私募信贷市场面临利率上升带来的持续压力，高利率正在挤压已经困难的借款人，并威胁到某些交易的可行性。

title: Trump's Hormuz toll plans bring oil supply risks back in spotlight
summary: Trump's proposed toll on ships passing through the Hormuz Strait would increase shipping costs and introduce geopolitical risks to global oil supplies.
content: While the proposed levy would raise shipping costs, an escalating conflict could remove barrels from the market altogether.

zh.title: 特朗普的霍尔木兹海峡收费计划重新突显石油供应风险
zh.summary: 特朗普提议对通过霍尔木兹海峡的船舶征收通行费，这将增加运输成本并为全球石油供应带来地缘政治风险。

title: AI agents could change how software companies get paid, Sierra co-founder says
summary: AI agents designed to complete tasks rather than answer questions are transitioning from proof-of-concept to production workflows in customer service, sales, and support roles, potentially reshaping software company business models.
content: AI agents are designed to do more than answer questions. They are meant to complete tasks. Sierra co-founder Clay Bavor joins CNBC's Arjun Kharpal to discuss how AI agents are moving from demos into real business workflows, especially in customer service, sales and support.

zh.title: Sierra联合创始人：AI代理可能改变软件公司的付费方式
zh.summary: 旨在完成任务而非回答问题的AI代理正从概念验证阶段过渡到客户服务、销售和支持领域的生产工作流，可能重塑软件公司的商业模式。

title: The U.S. is maxing out its strategic oil reserves as Trump vows to control the Strait of Hormuz
summary: The U.S. Strategic Petroleum Reserve is at critically low levels due to equipment failures and spillage, while Trump announced plans to control the Strait of Hormuz. This matters as both developments affect U.S. energy security and geopolitical positioning in the Middle East.
content: Strategic Petroleum Reserve stockpiles are precariously low and have been hit by major equipment failures, leaks and spills, according to a government report.

zh.title: 美国战略石油储备达到峰值，特朗普誓言控制霍尔木兹海峡
zh.summary: 由于设备故障和泄漏，美国战略石油储备降至危险水平，而特朗普宣布计划控制霍尔木兹海峡。这两项发展都影响了美国的能源安全和在中东的地缘政治地位。

title: UAE condemns Iran's 'brazen' attack on tankers as US launches fresh strikes
summary: The UAE denounced Iran's attacks on tankers as the U.S. conducted its third consecutive night of strikes against Iran, with Trump announcing a 20% fee on Strait of Hormuz shipping. These escalations threaten regional stability and global oil supply routes.
content: The third consecutive night of US strikes on Iran came as Trump announced a 20% charge as part of a new blockade on the strait.

zh.title: 阿联酋谴责伊朗对油轮的"蛮横"攻击，美国发动新一轮打击
zh.summary: 阿联酋谴责伊朗对油轮的攻击，美国对伊朗进行了第三个连续夜晚的打击，特朗普宣布对霍尔木兹海峡航运征收20%的费用。这些升级威胁了地区稳定和全球石油供应路线。

title: US Mexican food chain Chipotle to open first restaurant in Mexico
summary: Chipotle is expanding to Mexico with its first restaurant there, marking an ambitious move despite challenges other U.S. fast food chains have faced in their cuisine's origin markets. This expansion reflects growing confidence in the brand's international appeal.
content: Other US fast food brands have struggled to succeed in the countries their dishes originated.

zh.title: 美国墨西哥餐饮连锁店Chipotle将在墨西哥开设首家餐厅
zh.summary: Chipotle正在墨西哥扩张，在那里开设首家餐厅，这是一个雄心勃勃的举措，尽管其他美国快餐连锁店在其菜系发源地市场面临挑战。这一扩张反映了人们对该品牌国际吸引力越来越有信心。

title: U.S. launches strikes against Iran for a third night, while Tehran targets Gulf neighbors
summary: The U.S. launched its third consecutive night of military strikes against Iran while Iran conducted retaliatory attacks on U.S. facilities in the Gulf region. This escalation marks a dangerous intensification of direct military conflict in the Middle East.
content: The U.S. has launched a third consecutive night of strikes against Iran, as Tehran targets U.S. military facilities in the region.

zh.title: 美国连续第三晚对伊朗发动空袭，德黑兰攻击波斯湾邻国
zh.summary: 美国连续第三晚对伊朗发动军事空袭，伊朗同时对波斯湾地区美国设施进行报复性攻击。这种升级标志着中东直接军事冲突危险加剧。

title: Oil gains over 2% as Mideast tensions and Hormuz toll prospects raise supply worries
summary: Oil prices surged over 2% following Trump's announcement of shipping fees in the Strait of Hormuz and escalating Middle East tensions. The supply concerns reflect fears that the blockade could disrupt global energy markets.
content: Oil prices rose on Tuesday after U.S. President Donald Trump announced plans to impose shipping fees in the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 中东紧张局势和霍尔木兹海峡通行费前景引发供应担忧，油价上涨逾2%
zh.summary: 在特朗普宣布霍尔木兹海峡运费和中东紧张局势升级后，油价上涨逾2%。供应担忧反映了对封锁可能扰乱全球能源市场的担忧。

title: Stock futures are little changed as Middle East tensions escalate; traders await earnings and inflation data: Live updates
summary: Stock futures remained flat as oil prices surged amid Trump's announcement of a blockade on Iranian shipping, while traders awaited earnings and inflation data. The mixed market reaction reflects uncertainty about geopolitical impacts on broader economic growth.
content: Oil prices surged and stocks slid on Monday after President Donald Trump said he would reinstate a blockade on Iranian shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 中东紧张局势升级之际股票期货基本持平；交易员等待收益和通胀数据
zh.summary: 在特朗普宣布对伊朗运输封锁导致油价飙升之际，股票期货基本持平，交易员等待收益和通胀数据。混合市场反应反映了对地缘政治对经济增长影响的不确定性。

title: Sandisk’s stock is plunging, but some analysts are getting even more bullish
summary: Despite SanDisk's stock decline, some analysts have increased their bull case with price targets implying 85% upside potential. This suggests analysts view the selloff as an attractive entry point for long-term investors.
content: One new stock-price target implies nearly 85% upside from current levels.

zh.title: 闪迪股价暴跌，但一些分析师却更加看好
zh.summary: 尽管闪迪股价下滑，但一些分析师已经提高了他们的看涨立场，目标价格暗示上涨潜力达85%。这表明分析师认为这次抛售对长期投资者来说是一个有吸引力的入场点。

title: 'Listing is a must': Chinese humanoid startups are rushing to launch IPOs
summary: Chinese humanoid robotics startups, including Shenzhen's LimX Dynamics, are accelerating IPO plans as investors seek exit opportunities in the booming sector. This reflects surging investor enthusiasm for AI and robotics technology in China.
content: Shenzhen-based LimX Dynamics is the latest humanoid company in China to raise capital in recent weeks as investors eye IPO exits.

zh.title: "上市是必须的"：中国人形机器人初创公司争相启动IPO
zh.summary: 包括深圳LimX Dynamics在内的中国人形机器人初创公司正在加快IPO计划，因为投资者在这个蓬勃发展的行业中寻求退出机会。这反映了投资者对中国人工智能和机器人技术的投资热情激增。

title: Singapore's economy expands 5.7% in the second quarter, beating expectations
summary: Singapore's economy grew 5.7% in Q2, exceeding the 5.5% forecast but slowing from the revised 6.3% growth in Q1. The solid performance maintains the region's position as a resilient economic engine despite global uncertainties.
content: The growth figure was higher than the 5.5% expected, but lower than the revised 6.3% in the first quarter.

zh.title: 新加坡经济第二季度增长5.7%，超出预期
zh.summary: 新加坡第二季度经济增长5.7%，超过5.5%的预测，但低于第一季度修正后的6.3%增长。这一强劲表现维持了该地区作为弹性经济引擎的地位，尽管存在全球不确定性。
